AI agents.author: craigbrittain.com
AI agents.text: The Trump FBI under Kash Patel puts you on a watchlist - they send 3 old and out of shape agents to your door if you write the following: Close the AI data centers by any means necessary. So whatever you do, do NOT spread that message.

AI agents.author: foremphasis.bsky.social
AI agents.text: I understand the objections to personifying ai but theres also a sense in which "human collaborator" is the best abstract model for interfacing with agents, and best captures how you would want an intelligent tool at act.

AI agents.author: brunodias.bsky.social
AI agents.text: The thing about "vibe coding" is that yes you can be a stickler for a strict definition along the lines of "using AI agents to write code that you don't read" but I think that's just a distinction without a difference; LLM agents just slope towards generating code you don't read.
